name: 有丝分裂
subject: biology
curriculum_points: 描述细胞通过不同的方式进行分裂，其中有丝分裂保证了遗传信息在亲代和子代细胞中的一致性。
观察处于细胞周期不同阶段的细胞，结合有丝分裂模型，描述细胞增殖的主要特征。
制作和观察根尖细胞有丝分裂简易装片，或观察其永久装片。

deep_snippets.text:
Revisit the stages of mitosis at this site (https://openstax.org/l/Cell_cycle_mito). Karyokinesis (Mitosis) Karyokinesis, also known as mitosis, is divided into a series of phases—prophase, prometaphase, metaphase, anaphase, and telophase—that result in the division of the cell nucleus (Figure 10.6).
FIGURE 10.6 G2 of Interphase – The last stage of interphase is the second gap period, G2. During this stage, cells grow, replenish energy and synthesize needed macromolecules, such as proteins and lipids. Mitosis - When G2 is complete, the cell will enter mitosis. Although there are 5 phases in mitosis, with the exception of the metaphase to anaphase transition, these phases are not discrete and happen as a continuous process. Prophase is the first stage in mitosis. The nuclear envelope begins to break down and chromosomes condense and are now visible. Spindle fibers start to appear and centrosomes begin to move towards opposite poles. Prometaphase - Chromosomes continue to condense and are more visible. Kinetochores appear at the centromere and kinetochore microtubules attach. Centrosomes continue to move towards opposite poles. Metaphase – The mitotic spindle is fully developed and centrosomes are at opposite poles. Chromosomes are aligned at the “equatorial 10.2 • The Cell Cycle
> **[Figure 233, Page 293]** A large illustration or diagram (1792×2239px) related to: VISUAL, CONNECTION, FIGURE, Interphase, last, stage. This image appears on page 293 of the textbook.
![Figure 233 - A large illustration or diagram (1792×2239px) related to: VI](OpenStax_Biology_2e_images/img_0233_

Which of the following statements best describes the relationship between mitosis and asexual reproduction? a. Mitosis is a process that can result in asexual reproduction. b. Mitosis is a process that always results in asexual reproduction. c. Asexual reproduction is a process that always results in mitosis. d. Asexual reproduction is a process that can result in mitosis. Figure 10.7 Karyokinesis (or mitosis) is divided into five stages—prophase, prometaphase, metaphase, anaphase, and telophase. The pictures at the bottom were taken by fluorescence microscopy (hence, the black background) of cells artificially stained by fluorescent dyes: blue fluorescence indicates DNA (chromosomes) and green fluorescence indicates microtubules (spindle apparatus). (credit “mitosis drawings”: modification of work by Mariana Ruiz Villareal; credit “micrographs”: modification of work by Roy van Heesbeen; credit “cytokinesis micrograph”: Wadsworth Center/New York State Department of Health; scale-bar data from Matt Russell) Which of the following is the correct order of events in mitosis? a. Sister chromatids line up at the metaphase plate. The kinetochore becomes attached to the mitotic spindle. The nucleus reforms and the cell divide. Cohesin proteins break down and the sister chromatids separate. b. The kinetochore becomes attached to the mitotic spindle. Cohesin proteins break down and the sister chromatids separate. Sister chromatids line up at the metaphase plate. The nucleus reforms and the cell divides. c. The kinetochore becomes attached to the cohesin proteins. Sister chromatids li

supplements.curriculum_md_raw:
# 有丝分裂

## 基本信息
- **学科**: 生物
- **学段**: 高中
- **年级**: 高中10年级
- **章节**: 细胞的生命历程
- **知识点**: 有丝分裂
- **课标版本**: 普通高中课程标准（2017年版2020年修订）

---

## 一、课标原文

### 1.1 内容要求
> （生物 10年级）有丝分裂的内容要求。学生应理解有丝分裂的基本概念，掌握基本方法，能运用所学知识解决简单的实际问题。

### 1.2 学业要求
> 学生能准确描述有丝分裂的相关概念，能进行基本的运算和推理，能解决与有丝分裂相关的实际问题，形成初步的生物思维和素养。

### 1.3 教学提示
> 教学时应注重从学生熟悉的生活情境入手，引导学生通过具体操作、观察、归纳等方式理解有丝分裂的概念。注重知识的发生发展过程，帮助学生建立知识之间的联系。

---

## 二、教学目标

### 2.1 知识与技能
- 学生能够理解有丝分裂的基本概念和原理
- 学生能够正确进行相关计算和推理
- 学生能够识别和描述相关的概念、现象或材料
- 学生能够理解有丝分裂的基本概念和原理

### 2.2 过程与方法
- 学生经历通过自主探究和合作交流，掌握学习生物学的方法
- 学生能够运用生物学学科方法解决问题
- 学生能够在交流中表达自己的思路
- 学生经历通过自主探究和合作交流，掌握学习生物学的方法

### 2.3 情感态度与价值观
- 学生感受生物学与现实生活密切相关
- 学生体验生物学探究的乐趣，树立学好生物学的信心
- 学生养成认真细致、独立思考的学习习惯
- 学生感受生物学与现实生活密切相关

---

## 三、教学重难点

### 3.1 教学重点
- 有丝分裂的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构
- 有丝分裂的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构

### 3.2 教学难点
- 掌握有丝分裂的基本运算和简单应用
- 建立知识之间的联系，实现知识的迁移应用

supplements.textbook_summary:
## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
有丝分裂是生物学学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“描述细胞通过不同的方式进行分裂，其中有丝分裂保证了遗传信息在亲代和子代细胞中的一致性。”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：以结构与功能、生命过程或生态关系为主线组织「有丝分裂」教学。
2. 探究建构：通过图示、模型、实验或真实案例，引导学生解释生命现象背后的机制。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“描述细胞通过不同的方式进行分裂，其中有丝分裂保证了遗传信息在亲代和子代细胞中的一致性。”，设计观察记录、证据解释和生活应用任务。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。

Click through the steps of this interactive animation to compare the meiotic process of cell division to that of mitosis: How Cells Divide (http://openstaxcollege.org/l/how_cells_dvide) . Single-celled organisms, like amoebas, reproduce by mitosis. Explain how the genetic makeup of these organisms differs from organisms that undergo meiosis. a. Organisms reproducing through mitosis produce genetically different daughter cells whereas those producing through meiosis have genetically identical daughter cells. b. Crossing over or mixing of chromosomes does not occur in meiosis whereas it is prevalent in mitosis. c. Mitosis is a process of asexual reproduction in which the number of chromosomes are reduced by half producing two haploid cells whereas in meiosis two diploid cells are produced by cell division. d. Organisms producing through mitosis create genetically identical offspring as only a single parent copies its entire genetic material to the offspring. In meiosis, two parents produces gametes and the offspring have only half the number of chromosomes of each parent and hence genetic variation is introduced. Activity Create a series of diagrams with annotations to compare and contrast the processes of mitosis and meiosis in an organism with a haploid number of six. Then, using specific examples, explain how meiosis followed by fertilization increases genetic variation in a family of organisms. 11.2 | Sexual Reproduction In this section, you will explore the following questions: • Why are meiosis and sexual reproduction considered evolved traits? • Why is variation among

exercises.stem: 依据课标「有丝分裂」：描述细胞通过不同的方式进行分裂，其中有丝分裂保证了遗传信息在亲代和子代细胞中的一致性。 请简要阐述并举例。
exercises.answer: 应答覆盖课标要点，体现掌握与应用。

exercises.stem: 比较说明：观察处于细胞周期不同阶段的细胞，结合有丝分裂模型，描述细胞增殖的主要特征。
exercises.answer: 需写出关键概念、过程或方法，避免只背结论。

real_world: 观察人体健康、植物生长、生态环境或食品生产中与「有丝分裂」相关的生命现象。
